item.description: we've been so nervous of moving even slightly away from Lucien's Synthwave roots but Country means so much to me personally and we finally were able to choose 8 tracks that balance both worlds. Wish us luck. These couple of weeks have been insane

.

item.dc:creator: MacabreMard

item.title: BEST Showrooms Were Insane
item.description:
Best Products Company was a catalog seller with over 169 showrooms across America at their peak
The company was founded in 1957 and by 1970 decided to partner with the SITE architectural collective to create 9 showstopper locations, each with a separate unique and wildly improbably design.
The tilting facade that appears to be floating away, lifted off by the wind
Here's a model of one of the stores with the face ripped off and a jungle growing in between the body and the entrance
And here's what it actually looked like in practice
A view from the jungle in between the two pieces
My personal favorite, this one with the bricks peeling off like a sticker whose glue has dried out.
This poor crumbling ruin was designed to look post apocalyptic
There's even a section of the retail store that's been incorporated into the exterior design, with all the products whitewashed and bonded in place.
Another architectural model
And the finished product
More on the crumbling design
Including the bricks
Even the ones that weren't built by SITE were still very design heavy
The company folded in 1997, pushed out of business by the rise of Wal Mart & Target
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: Republicans going for a nationwide ban
item.description: It never stops. Source: https://apnews.com/article/abortion-indictment-lousiana-new-york-doctor-63ff4d9da8a9b592a7ca4ec7ba538cd3 Arrest warrant issued for New York doctor indicted in Louisiana for prescribing abortion pill
item.dc:creator: intercitydude

item.title: Well... At least I did *something*...
item.description: Went protesting today, Omas gegen Rechts (Grannies against Rightwing) had organized it against the AfD, but given the last few days, it also became one against the CDU, too. 20k-25k people came. Can't say I enjoyed it, can't say that I believe that it will have any noticeable effect, but, well, at least I added 1 to the number of people there.
item.dc:creator: MyLastAccountWasShadowbanned

ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Agua de Panela - Burrito Brown YouTube: https://youtu.be/06trBzWbd0Y?si=KyidF7zoe6PTD0a7 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/6BvEjxBgVce0nJeHP6qTPi?si=f9775aed50064817

Fan Yang

Tooth Wu
Shuo Shi
Eddie Mendoza
Alexey Borkovskiy
Dominik Mayer
Stanislav Lunin
Anzhelika Kasyanova
NOOBOVICH
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: Saturday WHOLESOME Dump To Improve Your Mood #319
item.description:
1. That is one chill cat
2. Insert happy feelings
3. Doggo about to fly
4. Why have you forsaken me, Mother?!
5. The Most Nonchalant Ace Combat Pilot
6. Big Ears Does This When She Wants To Be Picked Up
7. Horse mimics owner who is making Snow Angels
8. God Forbid Girls Have Some Fun
9. Wholesome Packaging
10.
11. Awww
12. Have You Had The Brosnan Latte Yet? I hear it's good
13. Jack Black Should Play A SuperHero Dad?
14. A Good Way To Wake Up
15. Hey you, have a good day ;) P.S. For the past 20 months, I’ve been working on my own game, and while it’s starting to get a bit of attention, it just makes me doubt myself even more. A lot of people have played the demo, and I can feel the pressure because, come release day, it’s all or nothing. Some days it feels great, and other days, I’m completely burnt out. I just hope I can give people a similar experience to the ones I had growing up, playing games and having a blast. If you’d like to support my efforts, a simple wishlist would mean the world to me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S.+ Have an awesome Weekend!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

Aftermath on the streets
News coverage.

item.dc:creator: animalonplanet

item.title: Losing my work bestie
item.description: I am going to lose my work bestie in April, possibly forever. I already lost my last work bestie which totally sucks. Teaching can be super isolating and having co-worker friends means a lot. At the same time, leaving your baby after 12 weeks? Of course that's hard. Not getting any income for 3 months? Way harder. It's impossible for a single teacher, and even if your kids are older, we don't get much in the way of sick days. This is ridiculous. The majority of teachers are female, you'd think we'd have accomodations but no. Let's churn and burn. Florida sucks.
item.dc:creator: AranaDiscoteca
